Test suite for serial approval chain (逐级审批) functionality.          Test Methods
Test that serial approval progresses through nodes in order.                  Va
Test that the second node is blocked until first node is approved.
Test that rejection at any node terminates the approval chain.
Test suite for counter-sign (会签) approval mode.          All approvers must appr
Test that counter-sign requires all parallel nodes to be approved.
Test that any rejection in counter-sign mode terminates the chain.
Test that chain cannot proceed until all parallel nodes are decided.
Test suite for or-sign (或签) approval mode.          Any approver can approve to
Test that or-sign mode proceeds when any node approves.                  Validat
Test that or-sign mode remains pending until any approval.                  Vali
Test that rejection in or-sign doesn't terminate - others can still approve.
Test suite for approval decision recording and persistence.          Test Method
Test that approval comments are recorded in the database.                  Valid
Test that decision timestamps are accurately recorded.                  Validate
Test that approval records maintain referential integrity.                  Vali
Test suite for approval timeout detection and flagging.          Test Methods:
Test that overdue approvals (>72 hours) are marked as timed out.
Test that 72-hour threshold is correctly applied.                  Validates ATB
Test that recently created nodes are not flagged as timed out.
Test suite for application withdrawal functionality.          Test Methods:
Test that the applicant can withdraw a pending application.                  Val
Test that withdrawal marks all remaining nodes as skipped.                  Vali
Test that non-applicants cannot withdraw applications.                  Validate
